title: MoU contents detailed: Hormuz reopen, ceasefire extension, nuclear commitments, sanctions relief
snippet: Detailed contents of the US-Iran MoU emerged: Strait of Hormuz to reopen immediately without tolls with pre-war shipping levels restored within 30 days; 60-day ceasefire extension; nuclear commitments including Iran committing to never acquire a nuclear weapon and resolving enriched uranium stockpile; sanctions relief tied to compliance milestones. Trump stated the deal 'conceptually deals' with nuclear material. The framework covers maritime security, military de-escalation, nuclear nonproliferation, and economic relief in an integrated package.
tag_reason: Most detailed leak of MoU contents yet; Hormuz terms (immediate reopen, no tolls, 30-day normalization) are new specifics; nuclear commitment language revealed; sanctions relief structure disclosed; 'conceptually deals' qualifier on nuclear material is notable hedge
